name: Akhar ayam alymam
overview: The story of the Kingdom of Yamamah in its two phases of prosperity and tragic collapse, and the futile conflict between the two great Arab tribes of Tasm and Jadis. Yamamah fell into the mire of these conflicts, but it maintained its independence and prosperity for a long time until the scourge of injustice and tyranny befell it, and the epidemic of division, dispute and conflict spread among its people.
